title: EB on the latest, CC has update - no update buttons
scenario: Firmware update dialog appears repeatedly on app restart but no update button visible on Home or Settings screens when Companion App has update available but Embedded Base is already on latest version
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Pair a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) that has its Embedded Base (EB) firmware already on the latest version.
3. Ensure the Companion App (CC) has a firmware update available (e.g., via the Poly Lens server).
4. Observe the update dialog/toast that appears on first pairing.
6. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the update dialog/toast reappears on the 3rd, 5th, 10th, 13th, 15th, etc. restart.
8. Navigate to the Home screen and look for any update button or firmware update prompt.
9. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and look for any update button or firmware update prompt.
expected: A firmware update button or prompt should be visible on the Home screen or Device Settings screen (e.g., under Audio Settings or a dedicated Firmware Update section) to allow the user to initiate the update.
